name: lukaisu
description: Lukaisu — the official mobile client for self-hosted Lukaisu Server instances

scripts.sync: npm run build:webapp && npm run pull:webapp && cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.sync:connect-shell: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug:connect-shell: npm run sync:connect-shell && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
